storyInfo: After making up her mind to accept the L.G.D.'s invitation, Hoshiguma and her three lackeys decide to 'have a little fun together', but they still cannot believe their Madame Oni wants to join the force.

attributes.content: We're here, Old Tung.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Same as always?
attributes.name: Uncle Tung

attributes.content: Yup. Two mala, one curry, and a clear soup.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Man, Old Tung's finballs are really—
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Old Tung? That's Uncle Tung to you, boy!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: It just slipped out, man.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: I know we call you Dumb Tau sometimes, but do you really have to be stupid for real?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: What's with you today, Ah Sam?
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: I just can't with this dumbass—
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: So what if he's dumb? What did Madame Oni tell you, huh? Who you trying to act all big for?
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Ah Hsiang! I don't care if I'm an idiot or not, just stop arguing.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Right, Madame Oni? Say a little something.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Come on, guys. You're all hangry, or what?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ah Sam, apologize to Daai Tau.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sorry... I got worked up.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Ah Hsiang, say sorry to Ah Sam too.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ah Hsiang!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: My bad. Shouldn't have been so aggro.
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Now we're all good, yeah?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Let's switch topics. What happened to the guys under 'Kyut Yat Mun' after you got rid of him two days back?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Mr. Lin has his own plans, so I didn't ask. But seems like he just told them to behave, so they got off pretty lightly.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Oh.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Uh, Madame Oni.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Hm? What is it?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Actually, I wanted to ask...
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: I see Dumb Tou's mouth is slow today too. I'll do it. Madame Oni, isn't today our... uh...
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Come on, guys. One after the other?
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: I'll say it for them, Madame Oni. You told us your plans for the future, so we were thinking, why not throw one last party?
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Cause we might not get the chance to meet up again in future, so we wanted to ask... why exactly do you want to...
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Go to the—
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Make way, make way. Finballs incoming.
attributes.name: Uncle Tung

attributes.content: My thank you present for ridding Downtown of those pests: radish for each of you, and Hoshiguma gets an extra fowlbeast wing.
attributes.name: Uncle Tung

attributes.content: Thanks.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma
Ah Hsiang & Ah Sam & Daai Tau

attributes.content: Sigh. I know you guys have your worries, but what happened to the smooth talkers I know, the ones who say they taught me how to talk? Why so quiet now?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...Thanks, Uncle Tung.
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang & Ah Sam & Daai Tau

attributes.content: Don't mention it.
attributes.name: Uncle Tung

attributes.content: It's normal for kids to be in denial after you drop such a big bomb on them.
attributes.name: Uncle Tung

attributes.content: I have to handle the takeaway orders. Sauces are all self-service over at the counter.
attributes.name: Uncle Tung

attributes.content: Got it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: 'Big bomb'? Didn't Madame Oni just tell us about it today? How does he know already?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Dude, your years in with the triads were a waste.
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: You know why Uncle Tung has a lame leg? You know who he took a blow for?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Who? Mr. Lin?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: You really don't get it, huh? If Mr. Lin were the one I couldn't talk about, why would it be safe for you to constantly bring him up? Think about it: who is it that really shouldn't be mentioned?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Uh... Wei—?!
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: At least you knew to stop at his family name. Want a medal?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: My bad, man. Me and my dumb ass.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Uncle Tung and Mr. Lin are good old buddies because they both worked for that guy, back in the day.
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Now I see. I was just wondering why Mr. Lin was giving Madame Oni so much scary work lately. First it was 'Fowlwing Ng', then 'Funerary Cin', and now 'Kyut Yat Mun' today...
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: The dinner table turns quiet again.
Daai Tau, you and your big mouth!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Forget it, man.
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Madame Oni, didn't you say the Higashinese love to eat from every stall at your festivals or something? We're practically done with our finballs, so why don't we go for round two?
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Sure. Can't split up this early, can we?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Alcohol is where the real fun begins!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Yeah, man—
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Stop. Not another word from you tonight, or you'll spoil the mood.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Haha...
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Dumb Tau is such a handful. Madame Oni, I have a feeling he still thinks you're a Forte.
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Hey, now the garbage's coming out of YOUR mouth. I know she's an Oni from Higashi, okay?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: And?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Uh...
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Shame on you!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: It's not like Madame Oni's fresh off the boat in Lungmen, dude. She was with the Leungyi Society before she enlightened our useless asses, you know.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: The Leungyi Society?! Those are some tough customers!
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: What do you think, huh? Well, she was an unusually upstanding lady back in the day, so she had a big fanclub. And that's when Mr. Lin noticed her too.
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Enough war stories. I was a little too conspicuous those days, which is why the Leungyi Society...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But how could they blame you? Didn't Mr. Lin ask for your help? Could he have found someone else to do your job?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Isn't it thanks to you that half the society got out alive? And did anyone in the triads ever sully your name over this?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: I just can't help but to be mad for your sake.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Mr. Lin hired her once, to teach the Leungyi Society and Bagua Gang a lesson. I won't even get into him establishing the rules, but Lungmen hasn't seen a major gang in power since.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: These past few years, the remnants have been showing up on the streets, so Mr. Lin called her in to help again.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: But in the end... heh...
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Forget it. Enough talk! Drink!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Huh? What are you doing?
attributes.name: Barkeep's Voice

attributes.content: Madame Oni! Someone's—
attributes.name: Barkeep's Voice

attributes.content: Argh!
attributes.name: Barkeep's Voice

attributes.content: Calling the cops? Lee Bo-faat, you must be eager to die.
attributes.name: Fierce Voice

attributes.content: Hoshiguma suddenly stands up.
Phal?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: *cough* I'm fine, Madame Oni. He won't pull anything drastic with you around.
attributes.name: Unremarkable Barkeep

attributes.content: Mind dropping us a name, so we can catch up later?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No need to know where I'm from. I'm just here for one thing: to congratulate you on making your big deal.
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: The man slams the beer bottle on the table, and the jagged glass shines with a dangerous gleam.
With just a broken beer bottle?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: A broken bottle? You're underestimating what's inside.
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: The man reaches inside the bottle to pull out a rolled-up letter with his bleeding hand.
H-Hurry and call the cops!
attributes.name: Flustered Tourist

attributes.content: The cops?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: Your accent tells me you're no local.
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: I don't blame you for not knowing. Go and call then. How long do you think the cops will take to show?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: Wanna guess who they'll vent their anger on when you call them out here for nothing?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: How... how could this be...
attributes.name: Flustered Tourist

attributes.content: Check a guidebook before your next vacation, and avoid the slums, you hear me?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: Now scram!
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: The tourist rushes out of the bar.
The fierce man turns back to Hoshiguma and her group.
Let's get back on topic. 'Madame Oni', from today onwards, you are public enemy number one of all Lungmen's triads.
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: She only got rid of the real bullies, the ones who were even against you, and you want to make an enemy of her? You should be grateful!
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: You think we don't know who she was working for?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: Today, Lin tells her to kill 'Kyut Yat Mun', and she does it. If he puts one of my boys on the chopping block tomorrow, what do we do then, huh?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: To all you who don't live our lives, witness this with your eyes; and those who do, remember this—
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: She is now and will always be a traitor to our Downtown Lungmen.
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: What the hell are you saying? Who did she betray, huh?!
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Didn't she take the Lungmen Guard Department's offer to become a cop?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: Did this Oni not murder our brothers without hesitation, and even take the heads of a bunch of big shot triads just to show the cops her loyalty?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: All lies and slander—
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Slander? Why isn't she denying it, then?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: I noticed your group's gloomy vibe the second I walked in here. You there don't get how your wonderful Madame Oni could become a cop?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: If you wanna run with the triads, then you better cut her loose as soon as you can. It's true, we can't beat her right now, but do you think she can keep you safe around the clock?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: You don't have to drive a wedge between us—
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Laai Gam Sam, how's your mother doing?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: You dare?!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: There's no need to hassle these young men.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Stepping up on your own, huh? How kind you are, 'Madame'. Is that why Lin likes you so much, a blade that's loyal to a fault?
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: This is between us. Keep Mr. Lin out of it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Listen up, fellas. Anyone who dares raise a hand against my people, or even their friends and family without good reason...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You can look forward to me knocking down your door with Hannya and hacking you to bits and pieces.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...Hmph.
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: Whatever. I'm just a messenger, and my job's done. See ya!
attributes.name: Fierce Man

attributes.content: Madame Oni, don't listen to that rotter. Want something to drink?
attributes.name: Unremarkable Barkeep

attributes.content: Phal...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I won't bother you anymore. Get me the bill, and we'll go somewhere else for drinks.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Damn. There's no other hole in Downtown that'll take us...
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Forget it, man. We already got some beer from the convenience store and no one's gonna bother us, so it doesn't matter where we crack these cans open. Let's find somewhere with a cool breeze—
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: A breeze? The L.G.D. rooftop's probably the best spot for that.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Again with the garbage, huh?!
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: I can't hold it in.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: What's wrong with Mr. Lin, letting Madame Oni work with the L.G.D.?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: That jerk with the bottle can go to hell, but... I just can't figure it out.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: I just can't! What about you two, huh? And you, Madame Oni?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Yeah, I'm Dumb Tau, so tell me, you smart ones, what exactly are Lin and Wei planning with this?!
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Didn't I tell you from the start? It was my own decision to accept Mr. Wei's offer—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Yes, and you were right to! I'm not being sarcastic either, I know that was an offer you couldn't refuse!
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: After what happened earlier, even I know now you're a thorn in the side of the triads, and they'll do whatever it takes to get rid of you.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: And yet, what's Lin doing? He oughta be standing up for you! And what did he do? He made you become a cop!
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: How are you gonna survive in Lungmen if you turn him down? You could only take the deal!
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Madame Oni, did you forget how the cops treat us?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: They don't even think of us as human. All they ever do is kick us around.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: To be honest, Madame Oni. I don't get it either. What can a triad do, joining the L.G.D.?
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: The way I see it, Mr. Lin's just trying to curry favor with the other triads by getting you in there. Letting their guard down as they laugh at you, while he slowly takes control—
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Before Ah Hsiang gets to finish, Ah Sam abruptly stands up.
What are you doing, Ah Sam?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Nothing. I'm going to the L.G.D.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: This late? They're already closed.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Who cares? If the doors are locked, I'll just climb up, all the way to the roof.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Those damned cops are always trampling on us, so tonight we're flipping the tables on them.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: The three young men stride towards the L.G.D headquarters with drink in tow.
Hoshiguma could have stopped them, but she is one step too slow.
Or perhaps, she just doesn't want to tamp down the determination of the lackeys who care for her.
They do not fear her leaving, they fear the police will mistreat her.
Hah... hah... did... we finally make it?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Entering from the top-floor warehouse's the only option, seeing as the way to the roof was blocked by a bunch of stuff.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: I didn't think the L.G.D.'s roof would be stuffed with so much junk...
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Madame Oni... you sure you wanna go with us? Your new job's starting soon, what if your boss finds out you were here...
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: What's there to be afraid of? Even if the sky falls, I'm tall and I've got a horn. I'll just put a hole in it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Haha! Hahaha...
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Hah...
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: *sigh*
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: I'm real worried, Madame Oni. You being you, it'll only take a year or two before they start bullying and manipulating you.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Not happening with her. If it does, just come find us.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Ah Sam chugs his beer.
We'll try our best to hold on while she's away. I don't think Madame Oni will tolerate those bastards forever.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Don't.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ...Madame Oni?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: It wasn't Mr. Lin who had me join the L.G.D., but Mr. Wei. Why would he ever need to help Mr. Lin?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Didn't you say Uncle Tung and Mr. Lin used to work for Wei? If something happened to me, you'd help me out, right?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Hey, now!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Wanna look at this?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Isn't this the scrap that guy pulled out of his bottle? What about it?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Look at the signatures.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Tung Zeng, Anchors, Lian Heng, Si Yau, Baak Coek... and the Char Sius?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Who came up with these names? Did they get an earful from their mom while brainstorming to settle on 'Char Sius'?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: The funny ones are all baby gangs. With Mr. Lin breathing down their necks, no one dares use a cool name like 'Leungyi' or 'Bagua' anymore.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why do you think they tried to intimidate us today? You think they'd bother staging their broken bottle act if they actually had the guts to step over Mr. Lin and rub us out?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Lungmen will get better. I want to believe.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's changed a lot compared to when I first arrived here, and I think it'll only get better in future.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Madame Oni, if that's true, then why not just lay low until Mr. Lin gets all the triads under control?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: There's no reason you have to be a cop. Unless you were one in Higashi? Guess that'd make sense then.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: No... the things I did there... were far worse than what I've done in Lungmen.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: When all's said and done, those guys want you gone anyhow.
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: The warehouse atmosphere relaxed a little from laughing over the Char Sius' name, but the silence brings the mood back down.
Each man chugs a bottle on his own, their eyes turning redder and redder as the alcohol goes down.
Yeah, fine. Lungmen will get better and better, just not us.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Ah Sam—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Madame Oni, you've never told us about what happened back in Higashi, and we've never asked. So I'll just talk about our Lungmen days.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: You had it good with the Leungyi Society, but Lin destroyed it, and forced you to go solo!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Then you ran into us, and gave us a hand. You helped us live like actual people...
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: We want to treat you as one of us, like family. We want you to succeed, become famous—you have the moves for it!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: But what're we looking at now? They're forcing you to hide, and turning you into a target for the cops... what right do they even have to do that?!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Madame Oni, you said you want to believe Lungmen will get better. Do you really believe it, or are you just pushing yourself? I... I...
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: You're gonna be a cop? Over my dead body!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Ah Sam—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: In two quick steps, Ah Sam slams open the locked door to the rooftop. The cold night breeze pours into the warehouse, rousing a moldy stench.
Ah Sam!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You've had too much. Let's go down, and let's all go home.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Home? I can kowtow to my ah gong and go back home, but you? Madame Oni, do you really want to live the rest of your life as a puppet of the powerful?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Don't trust them! Yeah, they have the power, but they treat us like toys! They've never taken us seriously!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: You ask if I really think Lungmen will get better. And yeah—I'm not sure it'll happen. But I have to believe in it. I have to.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: The first time we met, should I have assumed you three were a trap laid by one of my enemies, or assassins out to kill me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm an Oni who destroyed my own home. I had no choice but to come here to Lungmen. At first, I didn't think I could fit in, I only wanted to be alone.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It was my Leungyi brothers who took me around the skyscrapers and busy streets to try char siu, lou seoi, and curry finballs.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I used to have trouble getting the Lungmen dialect tones right, and you guys were the ones who helped me practice.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: And Mr. Lin? He's never stabbed me in the back.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: So I have to trust him. Otherwise...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ah Sam trembles. He knows what she isn't saying.
Wanna bet? You won't last more than half a year at the L.G.D. You'll leave and never want to come back again.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: I'm not taking your bet.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You scared?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: No, I'm already playing.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I know, you're betting Lungmen will be kind to you.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: But I know how scary it is to lose this bet, and I'm scared of seeing you lose.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: I'm scared of seeing the fearless Madame Oni who only just learned how we talk... get stabbed in the back and become miserable again.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Even if it costs my life, I won't let you play on their table!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: I just can't bear to see them bully you, Madame Oni.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Ah Sam, let's not be rash—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ah Sam walks backwards, again and again, until his heel hits air.
He is now truly at a loss.
And so, under the alcohol's influence, he makes up his mind and falls backwards—
His collar is firmly grabbed, and his face slapped.
Are you crazy?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The feeling of weightlessness dispels most of his tipsiness.
I—
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Enough! Go downstairs, all of you! I'll personally see you three home tonight, safe and sound!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: ID, notebook, passport photo, and forms... they're all here.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Madame Oni—I mean, Officer Hoshiguma!
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Ah Sam?!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What are you doing here? Not trying to climb back up again, are you—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What are you talking about? I drank too much last night. And thinking back, it was my fault.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: So what are you doing here?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: So you're the Hoshiguma who's been sent our way?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: I am.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: And those guys behind you? Here to sign on too?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: They—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sir, we're triads Officer Hoshiguma arrested on her way to work today!
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Officer Hoshiguma swept all three of us off our feet in one move. Three bad dudes on her first day, sounds pretty awesome, right...?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: (Whispering) Dumb Tau, no one's gonna believe that!
attributes.name: Ah Hsiang

attributes.content: Pfft, just get outta here already.
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: We're real triads! We got plenty of cash on us too, you know. Arrest us and you can pick our pockets while you pad your records—
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: Chief Wei only just put out these new law enforcement guidelines, and here you are trying to bribe me?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: Fine, you got us, so why not give me a good whack with your stick?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: My stick? What are you talking about? Oh, I know. You're baiting me. I hit you, you write a complaint to the L.G.D., and I lose my job. Right?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Daai Tau

attributes.content: I see you're really itching for a beating though. Let's have Hoshiguma here take care of that.
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: Me?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Just tell me 'these three bastards were harassing me', and I'll have grounds to toss them in the can for a few days of reflection. What do you think?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: Ah Hsiang and Daai Tau run away.
Ah Sam also moves to go, but he turns back to look at Hoshiguma once more before he flees.
Hoshiguma returns his gaze.
That bet. Do you think I'll win or lose now?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I don't know, but...
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: I can at least dare to hope you win, Madame Oni.
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: Thanks for believing in me.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: But... if, and I'm saying if...
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: If you really do lose, don't forget us. We'll always be here, waiting, you get me?
attributes.name: Ah Sam

attributes.content: ...I won't forget.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The L.G.D. entrance is minimally decorated, but the dazzling simplicity almost has Ah Sam's eyes watering.
He does not dare to look at this place any longer, and wipes his face quickly. He bows slightly in Hoshiguma's direction, and runs toward Downtown, back to his brothers.
That was so weird. Were those thugs trying to cozy up to you?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: I'm telling you, you don't have to save their faces, these useless dregs—
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: They're my brothers.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: So you...
attributes.name: L.G.D. Officer

attributes.content: Yup.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: They're my brothers. Always have been.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma
